payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden double-door cabinet with recessed rectangular panels and a narrow vertical seam; smooth semi-gloss finish with slight reflections, mostly visible but partially occluded by a hanging pendant light and a stainless appliance at the left edge, left side slightly cut off in the crop — estimated approximately 2.0 m from the camera.
attributes: occluded by stainless appliance at left
